subject: Geology
title: Seismic Tomography
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Seismic Tomography.

hook.text: Just as a CT scan images your body, seismic tomography images Earth's interior using earthquake waves.

buildup.text: Seismic tomography analyzes millions of wave travel times to map variations in speed through Earth's interior.

discovery.text: Fast zones are cool, rigid rock. Slow zones are hot, partially molten rock. The map reveals mantle plumes and slabs.

twist.text: Tomography showed that subducted slabs sink all the way to the core-mantle boundary, not just into the upper mantle.

climax.text: Seismic tomography turned the mantle from a mystery into a mapped landscape. We now see Earth's hidden circulation.

punchline.text: Earthquakes gave us X-ray vision of Earth.

quiz.question: What does seismic tomography reveal?
options: 3D maps of temperature and composition inside the Earth
The exact time of future earthquakes
